interfaces.name: getHomeQuickTiles
interfaces.description: Get quick navigation tiles for key tasks such as swim lessons, lap lane reservations, memberships, parties, passes, and pool schedule.

interfaces.name: getHomeAnnouncementsAndAlerts
interfaces.description: Get current announcements, seasonal programs, and important alerts such as closures or schedule changes for the home page.

interfaces.name: getHomeAudienceEntryPoints
interfaces.description: Get audience-based entry points such as Kids Lessons, Adult Fitness, and Family Activities for the home page.

defaultCategoryId.description: Program category_id or logical category, e.g., 'swim_lessons_kids', 'fitness_classes'

interfaces.name: getProgramCategories
interfaces.description: Get top-level program and class categories for the Programs & Classes page, such as Swim Lessons for Kids, Fitness Classes, and Training & Certifications.

interfaces.name: getProgramFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for the Programs & Classes listing, including age ranges, skill levels, day-of-week, time-of-day, price ranges, and feature flags. Options may vary by category.

parameters.name: categoryId
parameters.description: Optional Program.category_id to tailor filters, e.g., 'swim_lessons_kids', 'fitness_classes', 'training_certifications'

includesCprFirstAid.description: Whether a filter for 'includes CPR/First Aid' should be shown for this category

weekendsOnly.description: Whether a 'weekends only' filter should be shown

locationPoolTypeFilter.description: Whether to show filter by Program.location_pool_type

interfaces.name: searchPrograms
interfaces.description: Search and filter programs/classes for the Programs & Classes listing based on category, age range, skill level, schedule, price, and features.

interfaces.name: getProgramDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a specific program or class, including schedule, description, pricing, features, and policies.

parameters.name: programId
parameters.description: ID of the Program to view.

registrationAllowed.description: True if direct registration is available (e.g., kids swim lessons, lifeguard certification).

canAddToCart.description: True for programs such as aqua fitness classes that can be added to cart.

waiverRequired.description: Whether a waiver acceptance checkbox is required on registration.

interfaces.name: registerForProgram
interfaces.description: Register or enroll a participant in a program (e.g., kids swim lesson, lifeguard certification) by creating a ProgramRegistration.

parameters.name: programId
parameters.description: Program.id for the class or course to register.

parameters.name: participantDateOfBirth
parameters.description: Participant date of birth in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

parameters.name: acceptWaiver
parameters.description: Must be true if the program requires waiver acceptance.

interfaces.name: getProgramRegistrationSummary
interfaces.description: Get confirmation details for a program registration, including the linked program and contact details, for display after enrollment.

interfaces.name: addProgramToCart
interfaces.description: Add a program (such as an aqua fitness class) to the cart for checkout. The cart is created automatically if it does not exist.

interfaces.name: getLapLaneFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for lap lane reservations such as time ranges, pool types, and default price ranges.

interfaces.name: searchLapLaneSlots
interfaces.description: Search available lap lane slots by date, time range, pool type, optional pool, price, and sort order.

parameters.name: startTime
parameters.description: Earliest slot start time, HH:MM 24-hour, e.g., '06:00'.

parameters.name: endTime
parameters.description: Latest slot end time, HH:MM 24-hour, e.g., '07:00'.

parameters.name: poolId
parameters.description: Optional Pool.id to restrict results to a specific pool.

interfaces.name: getLapLaneSlotDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a specific lap lane slot, including pool details and pricing, for the booking panel.

interfaces.name: reserveLapLaneSlot
interfaces.description: Reserve a selected lap lane slot by creating a LapLaneReservation.

parameters.name: lapLaneSlotId
parameters.description: LapLaneSlot.id of the slot being reserved.

interfaces.name: getLapLaneReservationSummary
interfaces.description: Get confirmation details for a lap lane reservation, including the slot information.

interfaces.name: getMembershipFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter options for membership plans, including membership types, durations, included access, and price ranges.

interfaces.name: searchMembershipPlans
interfaces.description: Search membership plans by type, duration, included access, price, and sort order for the Memberships page.

interfaces.name: getMembershipPlanDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a membership plan, including benefits, operating hours, and terms.

interfaces.name: purchaseMembership
interfaces.description: Purchase a membership plan by creating a MembershipPurchase record.

interfaces.name: getMembershipPurchaseSummary
interfaces.description: Get confirmation details for a membership purchase for display after checkout.

interfaces.name: getPartyCategories
interfaces.description: Get available party and rental categories such as Birthday Parties for the Parties & Rentals page.

interfaces.name: getPartyFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for party packages, including date guidance, party size ranges, amenities, and pricing guidance.

interfaces.name: searchPartyPackages
interfaces.description: Search birthday party packages by date, party size, amenities, maximum total price, and sort order.

computedTotalPrice.description: Total price for the given partySizeChildren, including any additional child fees.

isAvailableOnSelectedDate.description: Whether the package is available on the selected date.

interfaces.name: getPartyPackageDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a party package, including what is included, rules, and computed total price for a given date and party size.

parameters.name: selectedDate
parameters.description: Optional selected date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format to confirm availability.

parameters.name: partySizeChildren
parameters.description: Optional number of children used to compute total price.

computedTotalPrice.description: If partySizeChildren is provided, total price including additional child fees.

interfaces.name: createPartyReservation
interfaces.description: Create a reservation request for a specific party package on a chosen date and time.

parameters.name: preferredStartTime
parameters.description: Preferred start time in HH:MM 24-hour format, e.g., '14:00'.

interfaces.name: getPartyReservationSummary
interfaces.description: Get confirmation details for a party reservation request, including package details and total price.

interfaces.name: getPoolScheduleFilters
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the pool schedule, including activity types, pool types, and time-of-day presets.

interfaces.name: getPoolScheduleWeek
interfaces.description: Get the pool schedule for a calendar week, filtered by activity type, pool type, and optional time-of-day.

parameters.name: weekStartDate
parameters.description: Date for the Monday of the desired week in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

parameters.name: startTimeFrom
parameters.description: Filter sessions starting at or after this time, HH:MM 24-hour, e.g., '17:00'.

parameters.name: startTimeTo
parameters.description: Filter sessions starting at or before this time, HH:MM 24-hour.

interfaces.name: addSessionToMySchedule
interfaces.description: Add a specific pool schedule session (such as an open swim) to the single user's My Schedule list by creating a MyScheduleItem.

parameters.name: poolScheduleSessionId
parameters.description: PoolScheduleSession.id of the session to add.

interfaces.name: getMyScheduleItems
interfaces.description: Get all items saved in the single user's My Schedule, including open swim sessions, registrations, lane reservations, and party bookings.

interfaces.name: removeMyScheduleItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the My Schedule list.

interfaces.name: getPassFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for passes, including pass types and formats for the Passes page.

interfaces.name: searchPassProducts
interfaces.description: Search pass products by pass type, format, and optional visit/price criteria to help users choose passes such as 5-visit digital guest passes.

parameters.name: desiredTotalVisits
parameters.description: Desired total number of visits (e.g., 5) to aid in identifying suitable combinations.

parameters.name: maxTotalPrice
parameters.description: Maximum acceptable total price for the desiredTotalVisits, if specified.

interfaces.name: getPassProductDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information for a pass product, including visits per pass, usage rules, expiration, and restrictions.

deliveryDetails.description: How digital passes are delivered and redeemed.

interfaces.name: addPassProductToCart
interfaces.description: Add a pass product (single-visit or multi-visit) to the cart with a specified quantity. The cart is created if it does not yet exist.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Number of pass units to purchase, e.g., 5 for five single-visit passes.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current cart contents for the single user, including items, quantities, prices, subtotal, and item count.

cart.description: May be null if no cart exists yet.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of an existing cart item and return the updated cart summary.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: New quantity; if set to 0, the item may be removed.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart and return the updated cart summary.

interfaces.name: getCheckoutSummary
interfaces.description: Get a checkout-ready summary of the cart, including cart items and total amount, for display on the Checkout page.

interfaces.name: submitCheckout
interfaces.description: Submit the checkout for the current cart, creating an Order and any associated OrderItems. Cart and system state are handled internally.

interfaces.name: getAboutContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page, including mission, history, facilities, general hours, and key amenities.

items.description: Key amenities such as specific pools and fitness areas.

interfaces.name: getContactInfo
interfaces.description: Get primary contact details for the Contact page, including phone numbers, emails, and physical address.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a general contact form with a question about programs, rentals, memberships, or other topics.

interfaces.name: getPoliciesContent
interfaces.description: Get policy content for the Policies & FAQs page, including facility rules, safety guidelines, membership terms, cancellation, refund rules, and waiver information.

interfaces.name: getFaqSections
interfaces.description: Get structured FAQ sections for the Policies & FAQs page, covering registrations, reservations, passes, and schedules.

interfaces.name: searchLifeguardCertificationPrograms
interfaces.description: Specialized search wrapper for lifeguard certification courses held on weekends only, with filters for price, end date, and CPR/First Aid inclusion, sorted by total duration.

parameters.name: maxEndDate
parameters.description: Maximum allowed end date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format, e.g., '2026-06-29'.

interfaces.name: searchAquaFitnessEveningClasses
interfaces.description: Specialized search wrapper for evening aqua fitness classes (6–8 PM) under a given maximum price per session.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the single-user Cart object from storage and update timestamps as needed.

helperFunctions.name: _getCartWithItems
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the current Cart along with its CartItems and compute subtotal and item count.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateMySchedule
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to ensure the single-user MySchedule store exists before adding MyScheduleItem entries.

helperFunctions.name: _calculatePartyTotalPrice
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute total party package price based on PartyPackage, selected date, and partySizeChildren.
